title: わくわく！キミと過ごす休日

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a stroll downtown on my day off, I run into Ines Fujin. She
usually buries herself in part-time gigs outside of training, so I'm
surprised to see her out and about.
choice_data_list: Are you not working today?
Are you not working today?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer! Yep! It's my day off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I don't get to go out often, so I gotta make it count! It's just a matter
of deciding where to start!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Or at least... that's what I thought.
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It's just... I can whip up ideas to kill some time, but for a whole day?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's weird—I'm drawing a complete blank!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Considering her hectic lifestyle, I can't say I'm surprised. In that case...
choice_data_list:
How about I take the lead and show you
around?

How about I take the lead and show you
around?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?
choice_data_list: Think of it as thanks for all you've done for me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: All righty then! Guess I'll take you up on that offer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, where will you take me first? Hehe, I'm counting on you for a
super fun time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Awww! The cranes and koalas are sooo cuuuuute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The local zoo back home doesn't even come close to this one! I'm sure
my sisters will love it here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hoping to take her day up another notch, I whip out my phone to
check online for the must-see attractions. However, when I look at the
zoo map...
choice_data_list: The petting area is... Huh? It's not here?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Really? Let me check. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Seems like it got moved last week. It's on the other side of the
penguin habitat now!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wooooow! The view's amaaazing! I bet if we use that telescope, we
can see the school from here!
choice_data_list: Yeah, let's give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make a beeline to the telescope next to Ines Fujin, eager to slide a
coin in. But...
choice_data_list: Ah, I'm out of spare change!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oof! I think the change machine was over there somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Geez, slow down! The telescope isn't going anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, I feel like a real high roller here... It's giving me butterflies! ♪
choice_data_list:
I'm loaded with coins now, so let's go all out
and have fun!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah! Hold on, hold on! There's a warning sign here!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you need special coins to play. Let's head to the
exchange machine first, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we bounce from place to place. However, every single
time, I find myself relying on Ines Fujin.
choice_data_list: I made a total fool of myself today...
I made a total fool of myself today...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it, don't sweat it! Yeah, you made a few mistakes, but it
wasn't all that bad.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I got to try out a bunch of new things, and I could tell you really did
your best.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Honestly, it made me really happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I want to do better—I want her to know she can
depend on me. But at this rate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, I still have one more place up my sleeve that I'm sure she'll
absolutely love.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: (Woooo!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Look, look! That runner's not slowing down at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're on the edge of our seats watching the race—Ines Fujin's eyes
locked onto the blazing front runner.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
2,400 meters on turf... That's the same distance as the Japanese
Derby, and she smoked everyone like it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's also the same distance as the race I first saw her run in—the
one that reeled me in, hook, line, and sinker.
choice_data_list:
You'll be able to run just as fast—no, even
faster.

You'll be able to run just as fast—no, even
faster.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You really think I can do it? Actually, yeah... I know I can!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm sure of it now—I just looove the thrill of leading the pack!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I wanna run full speed and rip through the turf faster than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The wild beast within her awakens, sparking fire in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can see it—the crowd going wild as she crosses the finish line, all
chanting her name. The day her dream comes true.
choice_data_list:
Then we'll just have to take the lead straight
out of the gate!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Of course! That's what being a front runner is all about!
choice_data_list: We'll have to nail down our start dashes too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, one of the runners just now fell behind because of a bad start.
We gotta watch out for that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: There's also the risk of getting blocked or running out of gas...
choice_data_list: Then we'll focus on power and stamina training!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep, yep!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Wow, Trainer's really chatty now. I can feel the excitement and
passion... It's kinda like...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our talk continues from there, and before I know it, we've been
discussing training methods and strategies for hours.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I gotta say... You really picked the right career.
choice_data_list: Sorry, I got a bit carried away...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't trying to be sarcastic or anything! In fact, I reeeally
appreciate your dedication!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: And I gotta admit, you sounded pretty cool!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: So no need to apologize, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a bunch for today! I'd love to hang out again if we get the
chance!
choice_data_list: I promise I'll be better prepared next time!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep! Looking forward to it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, our day ends with a smile on Ines Fujin's lips. Despite a few
hiccups, I'd say we managed to make the most of her rare day off!
